recommendations.title: Operation Chromite
recommendations.overview: A squad of soldiers fight in the Korean War's crucial Battle of Incheon.

recommendations.title: 71: Into the Fire
recommendations.overview: In August 1950, waiting for UN troops to arrive, the South Korean army assembled to protect Nakdong River. Only 71 student-soldiers are left behind to guard the city of Pohang. Now they are on a mission to defend the country from North Korean troops.

recommendations.title: My Name Is Loh Kiwan
recommendations.overview: After defecting from North Korea, Loh Kiwan struggles to obtain refugee status in Belgium, where he encounters a dejected woman who has lost all hope.

recommendations.title: Love and Leashes
recommendations.overview: Love never hurt so good for two co-workers who enter a contractual relationship as partners in consensual play, pleasure and pain.

recommendations.title: Han Gong-ju
recommendations.overview: After being involved in a traumatic incident, 17-year-old Gong-ju is forced to change schools. Uncared for by her parents, her previous teacher arranges for her to hide away at his mother's place. It takes time for her past to catch up with her, but

recommendations.title: The Wailing
recommendations.overview: A stranger arrives in a little village and soon after a mysterious sickness starts spreading. A policeman is drawn into the incident and is forced to solve the mystery in order to save his daughter.

recommendations.title: Live Twice, Love Once
recommendations.overview: A retired academic teacher tries to find the love of his youth after being diagnosed with Alzheimer's.

recommendations.title: I Want to Eat Your Pancreas
recommendations.overview: After his classmate and crush is diagnosed with a pancreatic disease, an average high schooler sets out to make the most of her final days.

recommendations.title: The Beauty Inside
recommendations.overview: Woo-jin, a furniture designer who wakes up in a different body every day, falls for Yi-soo, a woman he meets through his work.

recommendations.title: The Yellow Sea
recommendations.overview: A Korean man in China takes an assassination job in South Korea to make money and find his missing wife. But when the job is botched, he is forced to go on the run from the police and the gangsters who paid him.
